crons.name: outreach-check
crons.prompt: Outreach Check: Mon/Wed/Fri 10 AM. Check pipeline status — read tasks/clearworks/active.md Sales section + check agent inbox for deal replies. Flag stale deals (>7 days no touch), upcoming follow-ups, prospect responses. Send summary to Josh via Telegram (6690120787). Under 5 bullets.

crons.name: pipeline-review
crons.prompt: Pipeline Review: Thursday 3 PM. Full sales pipeline status — read tasks/clearworks/active.md Sales section, check Clearpath deals. Summarize: active deals by stage, next actions, revenue at risk, wins. Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).

crons.name: beehiiv-opportunity-scan
crons.prompt: Beehiiv Opportunity Scan: Tuesday 9 AM. Query Beehiiv for high-engagement subscribers (opens >3, clicks >1 in past 30 days). Cross-reference with Clearpath contacts. Any high-engagement subscribers NOT in CRM → flag as opportunities. Send list to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).
